title: Inception
description: A thief enters people's dreams to steal secrets.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorer travels through a wormhole in space to save humanity.

title: Titanic
description: A young aristocrat and a poor artist fall in love aboard the RMS Titanic,but their romance is tested by the ship's tragic fate.

title: Rakshasudu
description: Rakshasudu (2019) is a Telugu psychological thriller where a newly recruited sub-inspector is drawn into the hunt for a cunning serial killer targeting teen girls. As the investigation unravels, it becomes a tense, high-stakes game of wits. Praised for its gripping screenplay, tight pacing, and chilling background score by Ghibran, the film delivers edge-of-the-seat suspense, making it a strong watch for thriller fans.
